_comment: TEMPLATE — NOT loadable. `template: true` makes validateBeautyManifest reject this manifest so Phase 32b Beauty stays hidden/disabled (R1.3, R7.1). To enable: remove `template`, set real `assets.detector`/`assets.landmarks` ONNX files on an allowlisted host (same-origin `/_model/{hf,gh,gcs}/…` proxy or a same-origin static path), fill each `url`/`sizeBytes`/`checksum` (sha256-<64 hex>) from the vendored bytes, set the top-level `sizeBytes` to the sum of all asset sizes, and confirm the tensor contracts below match a license-verified FaceMesh-derived detector (192×192 image → boxes+scores) and landmark (256×256 image → [1,478,3]) model pair. See README.md.
